sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Experience the ethereal energy of Selenite, a crystal renowned for its cleansing and protective properties. Often called the “Crystal of Clarity,” Selenite helps clear negative energies, enhances mental focus, and fosters a sense of spiritual connection. 

This bracelet is more than an elegant accessory—it’s a daily companion for those seeking peace, balance, and clarity in both body and mind. Ideal for meditation, energy work, or as a subtle statement of mindful living.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
Selenite Crystal - Known for peace, aura cleansing, spiritual healing, and clearing negative energy.

Natural Crystal Beads - Smooth white beads with a soft, calming, and pure appearance.

Stretchable Bracelet Base - Comfortable, flexible, and easy to wear daily.

Minimal Healing Design - Simple, peaceful, and suitable for everyday spiritual styling.

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
🤍 Supports Peaceful Energy

Helps create a calm, gentle, and balanced energy around you.

✨ Clears Negative Energy

Selenite crystal is known for cleansing unwanted vibrations and refreshing the aura.

🧘 Good for Meditation

Supports spiritual practices, prayer, mindfulness, and inner stillness.

🌙 Promotes Emotional Lightness

Helps you feel less heavy, more relaxed, and emotionally composed.

💫 Self-Cleansing Crystal Energy

Selenite is traditionally known as a self-cleansing crystal that also helps refresh nearby energy.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Wear the bracelet on your left hand, as it is the receiving hand for positive energy and abundance.

Keep it close to your skin for continuous crystal benefits throughout the day.
